title: AVL Balance Factor Check
description: Given a binary tree (parent array + values), check if it is AVL-balanced: for every node, |height(left subtree) - height(right subtree)| ≤ 1.
inputSpec: First line: n. Second line: n values. Third line: n parent indices (-1 = root). Fourth line: n child types: 0=left child, 1=right child, -1=root.

botCodes.code:
import sys
sys.setrecursionlimit(10000)
n=int(input())
vals=list(map(int,input().split()))
parents=list(map(int,input().split()))
side=list(map(int,input().split()))
left=[-1]*n;right=[-1]*n;root=0
for i,p in enumerate(parents):
    if p<0:root=i
    elif side[i]==0:left[p]=i
    else:right[p]=i
def h(u):
    if u<0:return -1
    lh=h(left[u]);rh=h(right[u])
    if lh is None or rh is None:return None
    if abs(lh-rh)>1:return None
    return 1+max(lh,rh)
print('YES' if h(root) is not None else 'NO')
